scripts.test:smoke:auth: npm run test:login && npm run test:dashboard && npm run test:users && npm run test:teams && npm run test:settings
scripts.test:smoke:content: npm run test:pages-list && npm run test:page-create && npm run test:editor-drag && npm run test:editor-save-publish && npm run test:editor-workflows && npm run test:media && npm run test:rich-text-lists && npm run test:status-badge
scripts.test:smoke:blog: npm run test:blog-create && npm run test:blog-editor && npm run test:blog-list
scripts.test:smoke:commerce: npm run test:commerce && npm run test:orders
scripts.test:smoke:data: npm run test:collections && npm run test:reusable-sections && npm run test:forms && npm run test:newsletter && npm run test:contacts && npm run test:comments
scripts.test:smoke:site: npm run test:sites && npm run test:site-detail && npm run test:frontend-design && npm run test:help && npm run test:help-rendered
scripts.test:smoke:admin: npm run test:smoke:auth && npm run test:smoke:content && npm run test:smoke:blog && npm run test:smoke:commerce && npm run test:smoke:data && npm run test:smoke:site
scripts.test:smoke:public: npm run test:ai-contract-examples --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:preview-contract --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:admin-auth --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:admin-site-scope --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:admin-site-scope:repository --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:admin-rbac-coverage --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:settings-admin-contract --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:admin-auth-supabase --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:admin-auth-production-policy --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:repository-runtime --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:form-captcha --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:media-quota --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:media-upload-contract --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:sdk-postgres-preflight-contract --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:media-safety --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:media-scope --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:media-secret-manager --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:site-webhook-delivery --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:commerce-webhook --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:commerce-webhook-secret --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:page-renderer --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:admin-contract --workspace @backy/public && npm run test:public-security --workspace @backy/public
scripts.test:smoke:all: npm run test:smoke:admin && npm run test:smoke:public
scripts.test:editor-components: for component in image icon video embed map input textarea select checkbox radio button repeater list divider columns nav spacer quote link form comment interactiveFigure codeBlock codeComponent box heading data-binding; do BACKY_EDITOR_COMPONENT_SMOKE=$component node scripts/editor-drag-smoke.mjs; done
scripts.test:editor-grouping: npm run test:editor-multiselect && npm run test:editor-nested-group
scripts.test:editor-workflows: npm run test:editor-smoke-coverage && npm run test:editor-inspector && npm run test:editor-reusable-section && npm run test:editor-section-flow && npm run test:editor-shortcuts && npm run test:editor-keyboard-nudge && npm run test:editor-view-only && npm run test:editor-grouping && npm run test:editor-marquee-origin && npm run test:editor-layers && npm run test:editor-inspector-actions && npm run test:editor-z-order && npm run test:editor-delete && npm run test:editor-clipboard && npm run test:editor-resize && npm run test:editor-zoom && npm run test:editor-preview-scroll && npm run test:editor-grid-snap && npm run test:editor-alignment-guides && npm run test:editor-page-settings && npm run test:editor-preview-link && npm run test:editor-revision-navigation && npm run test:editor-responsive && npm run test:editor-stress && npm run test:editor-media-upload && npm run test:editor-library && npm run test:editor-primary-action-status && npm run test:editor-command-palette && npm run test:editor-components && npm run test:editor-animation && npm run test:editor-rich-text && npm run test:editor-conflict && npm run test:editor-render-parity
